subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through divine bounty and infinite heavenly mercy, thou hast attained unto the recognition of the Sovereign of Days and the Lord of mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فضل الهی و رحمت نامتناهی ربانی بمعرفت سلطان ایام و مالک انام فائز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
